mapper.select: SELECT USER_SEQ, KAKAO_ID, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN, TO_CHAR(TOKEN_EXPIRE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TOKEN_EXPIRE, TO_CHAR(LAST_LOGIN, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LAST_LOGIN, TO_CHAR(INSERT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS INSERT_DATE FROM tuser_kakao WHERE KAKAO_ID = #{kakaoId}
SELECT KAKAO_ID, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE FROM tuser_kakao WHERE AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN = #{token} AND TOKEN_EXPIRE > SYSDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tuser_kakao ( USER_SEQ, KAKAO_ID, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN, TOKEN_EXPIRE, LAST_LOGIN, INSERT_DATE ) VALUES ( tuser_kakao_seq.NEXTVAL, #{kakaoId}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, #{autoLoginToken}, SYSDATE + 30, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE tuser_kakao SET NICKNAME = #{nickname}, PROFILE_IMAGE = #{profileImage}, AUTO_LOGIN_TOKEN = #{autoLoginToken}, TOKEN_EXPIRE = SYSDATE + 30, LAST_LOGIN = SYSDATE WHERE KAKAO_ID = #{kakaoId}
